title: Propose ADR 0003 for M1 entity store memory layout
summary: Produce the proposed Entity/Store memory layout ADR for M1 map, location, item, job and reservation state ownership without accepting the decision inside an implementation task.
acceptance: ADR-0003 is created with Status Proposed and records alternatives, migration, rollback, tests and performance implications
Contracts identify authoritative owners for map location, item quantity, job core, reservation ledger and index cleanup
ADR does not introduce UI-owned simulation state, hidden shared state, global scans or unversioned caches
Implementation tasks blocked on this ADR reference it explicitly

history.details: Proposed ADR-0003 for M1 entity/store memory layout and authoritative owners; checks passed; no implementation performed
